src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the JHipster version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current generator version.
Remove unnecessary empty braces from the annotation definition to modernize the code style.
Rename logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Update logger usage from 'log' to 'LOG' to match the renamed field.
Use 'var' for local variable declaration of SpringApplication to leverage Java 10+ local variable type inference.

Extract application name into a local variable for cleaner code and reuse.
Refactor Optional chain for contextPath to improve readability and formatting.
Update log message formatting to use the extracted applicationName variable.
Refactor string concatenation in pointcut definitions to use line continuations for better readability.
Refactor string concatenation in application package pointcut definitions to use line continuations for better readability.
Reformat logger error call in development profile to use single-line method invocation style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
logger(joinPoint)
                .error(
                    "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",

                    e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : "NULL",
                    e.getMessage(),
                    e
                );
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
logger(joinPoint).error(
                "Exception in {}() with cause = '{}' and exception = '{}'",
                joinPoint.getSignature().getName(),
                e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : "NULL",
                e.getMessage(),
                e
            );
